task_objective: Optimize post-backup single game refresh to resolve latency issues on Steam Decks with large libraries, and add the missing refresh to force_restore.
design_decisions: To prevent breaking existing test adapters and monkeypatches that mock `refresh_statuses` with zero parameters, we conditionally pass the `game_names` arguments on the adapter and client interface levels. This guarantees backward compatibility while supporting high-performance single-game targeted scans.
results: All 451 test cases passed, including new ones, with all Ruff lint/format and type checking validations passing successfully.
